mapper.select: SELECT plan_id, user_id, title, start_date, end_date, total_budget, memo, created_at, updated_at FROM travel_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_plan (user_id, title, start_date, end_date, total_budget, memo) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{totalBudget}, #{memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE travel_plan SET title = #{title}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, total_budget = #{totalBudget}, memo = #{memo} WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_detail (plan_id, content_id, title, latitude, longitude, visit_order, visit_date, memo) VALUES (#{planId}, #{contentId}, #{title}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{visitOrder}, #{visitDate}, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT detail_id, plan_id, content_id, title, latitude, longitude, visit_order, visit_date, memo FROM plan_detail WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY visit_order ASC
